title: HVAC Capacity Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool to optimize HVAC system capacity based on load, efficiency, and environmental factors, aligned with ISO 50001 and Lean Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Cooling Load
inputs.businessContext: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

inputs.label: Heating Load
inputs.businessContext: Total heat loss from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total heat loss from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

inputs.label: System Type
inputs.businessContext: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

businessContext_i18n.en: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Outdoor dry-bulb temperature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

businessContext_i18n.en: Outdoor dry-bulb temperature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

inputs.label: Relative Humidity
inputs.businessContext: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil performance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil performance.

inputs.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
inputs.businessContext: Current system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

inputs.label: Airflow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Supply air volume, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Supply air volume, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

inputs.label: Duct Leakage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Estimated leakage as percentage of total airflow; affects effective capacity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated leakage as percentage of total airflow; affects effective capacity.

rules.message: Both cooling and heating loads cannot be positive simultaneously for a single zone; check design conditions.
Airflow must be consistent with thermal load; consider minimum ventilation requirements.
Efficiency ratio out of typical range; verify input.
High duct leakage detected; consider sealing to improve effective capacity.

thresholds.message: System capacity is below 90% of load; risk of thermal discomfort and equipment strain.
Efficiency ratio low; consider maintenance or upgrade to reduce energy waste.
Relative humidity outside comfort band; latent capacity may be insufficient.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
